title: Session 1: App Mindset
desc: Develop the mindset and workflow used when creating useful applications.

title: Session 2: Requirements & User Flow
desc: Turn a problem into clear requirements and a logical user flow.

title: Session 3: UI/UX Basics
desc: Apply essential UI and UX principles to student app projects.

title: Session 4: Wireframing App Screens
desc: Plan application screens through practical wireframes before building.

title: Session 5: Screen Patterns & Navigation
desc: Recognize common screen patterns and organize navigation correctly.

title: Session 6: Data Planning Basics
desc: Identify the data an application needs and how records relate.

title: Session 7: Dart Basics for Custom Functions
desc: Learn basic Dart concepts used in FlutterFlow custom functions.

title: Session 8: Prelim Review
desc: Review and consolidate the complete Prelim coverage.

title: Session 9: FlutterFlow Workspace Tour
desc: Navigate the FlutterFlow workspace, panels, pages, and builder tools.

title: Session 10: Building Static Screens
desc: Create well-structured static screens using FlutterFlow widgets.

title: Session 11: Components, Styling & Consistency
desc: Build reusable components and maintain consistent visual styling.

title: Session 12: Navigation & App Flow
desc: Connect pages and actions to create a smooth application flow.

title: Session 13: Supabase Setup
desc: Create and configure a Supabase project for the class application.

title: Session 14: Database Tables in Supabase
desc: Design database tables, fields, keys, and relationships in Supabase.

title: Session 15: Connecting FlutterFlow to Supabase
desc: Connect FlutterFlow securely to a Supabase backend.

title: Session 16: Insert Data from a Form
desc: Use forms and actions to insert new records into the database.

title: Session 17: Read & Display Records
desc: Query, display, and organize database records inside the interface.

title: Session 18: Midterm Review
desc: Review and consolidate the complete Midterm coverage.

title: Session 19: Authentication Concepts
desc: Understand login, identity, sessions, and authentication workflows.

title: Session 20: Supabase Auth in FlutterFlow
desc: Implement Supabase email authentication within FlutterFlow.

title: Session 21: Data Ownership
desc: Associate records with users and display only the correct data.

title: Session 22: Update & Delete Records
desc: Allow users to safely edit and remove existing records.

title: Session 23: Role-Based App Behavior
desc: Create different application behavior based on assigned user roles.

title: Session 24: Security & Row Level Security
desc: Protect database records using Supabase Row Level Security policies.

title: Session 25: File and Image Upload
desc: Upload, store, retrieve, and display files and images.

title: Session 26: Dashboard & Simple Analytics
desc: Summarize records through dashboard cards and simple analytics.

title: Session 27: Emerging Technology Enhancement
desc: Select an emerging technology feature that improves the application.

title: Session 28: Building an Enhancement Feature
desc: Plan and build a meaningful enhancement feature for the project.

title: Session 30: UI/UX Polish & Animations
desc: Improve consistency, responsiveness, accessibility, and animations.

title: Session 31: Deployment Preparation
desc: Test, configure, publish, and verify the application on the web.

title: Finals Project: Independent Web App
desc: Complete and present an independent web application as the final project.
